message:
feat(freeze): Integrate builder with exception/error check helpers (Phase 2b)

- Add emitErrorCheck() to CBuilder for error code checks
- Update emitExceptionCheck() to use builder when use_builder_api=true
- Update emitErrorCheck() to use builder when use_builder_api=true
- Initialize builder in generate() when use_builder_api flag is set
- Fix OutputLanguage import cycle by re-exporting from codegen_ssa

The builder is now properly integrated with the two most common patterns
in freeze codegen: exception checks and error checks. When use_builder_api
is enabled, these helpers use the structured CBuilder API which:
- Automatically handles is_trampoline differences
- Uses RAII blocks for guaranteed brace closing
- Provides context-aware variable names

Legacy raw string output is preserved as fallback when builder is not enabled.

All 20 c_builder tests pass. Benchmarks unchanged.
